name: Mist OS
tagline: Stable Android 16 daily-driver tuning for pacman and pacmanpro.
highlights: Android 16 base aligned across Nothing Phone 2a and 2a Plus.
Thermal, camera, and day-to-day polish are grouped into the current drop.
Release notes stay short and practical before you jump to Telegram.
changelog: Synced the current Android 16 platform base across pacman and pacmanpro.
Grouped thermal, camera, and UX-facing cleanup into one stability-focused release.
Tightened daily-driver polish so the release stays consistent without feature churn.
